6:["$","li","3",{"className":"flex items-center gap-1","children":[["$","$L4",null,{"iconNode":"$0:rsc:props:children:0:props:children:4:props:children:0:props:children:props:children:props:children:1:props:children:0:props:iconNode","className":"lucide-chevron-right text-stone-300 shrink-0","size":13}],["$","span",null,{"className":"text-stone-600 font-medium line-clamp-1","children":"How to Choose the Right Desk for Your Home Office"}]]}]
7:["$","div",null,{"className":"bg-white dark:bg-stone-900 rounded-2xl p-6 sm:p-8 mt-4 shadow-lg border border-stone-100 dark:border-stone-800 mb-10","children":[["$","h1",null,{"className":"text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl font-bold text-stone-900 dark:text-stone-100 leading-tight mb-5","style":{"fontFamily":"'Playfair Display', Georgia, serif"},"children":"How to Choose the Right Desk for Your Home Office"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"flex flex-wrap items-center gap-4 text-sm text-stone-400","children":[["$","$L3",null,{"href":"/authors/mia-collins","className":"flex items-center gap-2 group","children":[["$","img",null,{"src":"https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1494790108377-be9c29b29330?w=400&h=400&fit=crop&auto=format&q=80","alt":"Mia Collins","className":"w-8 h-8 rounded-full object-cover object-top"}],["$","div",null,{"children":[["$","p",null,{"className":"font-semibold text-stone-700 dark:text-stone-200 text-sm group-hover:text-orange-600 transition-colors","children":"Mia Collins"}],["$","p",null,{"className":"text-xs text-stone-400","children":"Workspace Designer"}]]}]]}],["$","span",null,{"className":"flex items-center gap-1","children":[["$","$L4",null,{"iconNode":[["circle",{"cx":"12","cy":"12","r":"10","key":"1mglay"}],["path",{"d":"M12 6v6l4 2","key":"mmk7yg"}]],"className":"lucide-clock","size":13}]," ","7 min read"]}],["$","span",null,{"children":"March 10, 2026"}]]}]]}]
8:["$","div",null,{"className":"grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-10 pb-16","children":[["$","article",null,{"className":"lg:col-span-2","children":[["$","p",null,{"className":"text-xl text-stone-600 leading-relaxed mb-10 font-medium pl-4 border-l-4 border-orange-500","children":"Size, shape, material, storage — everything you need to weigh before buying the desk you will spend thousands of hours at."}],["$","div",null,{"className":"prose","children":[["$","h2","0",{"id":"the-most-important-piece-of-furniture-you-will-ever-buy","children":"The Most Important Piece of Furniture You Will Ever Buy"}],["$","p","1",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"Your desk is the anchor of your entire workspace. Every other decision — chair height, monitor position, lighting angle — radiates outward from it. Yet most people spend more time choosing a sofa they sit on for two hours an evening than a desk they sit at for eight hours a day."}}],["$","p","2",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"Getting the desk right is the single highest-leverage workspace decision you can make."}}],["$","h2","3",{"id":"start-with-size","children":"Start with Size"}],["$","p","4",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"The minimum useful desk depth is 24 inches. Anything less and you cannot place a monitor at a proper viewing distance without it being right in your face. For a comfortable single-monitor setup, 27–30 inches of depth is ideal."}}],["$","p","5",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"Width depends on what you do. Writers and coders can get by with 48–54 inches. Designers, video editors, or anyone with a dual-monitor setup should look at 60–72 inches."}}],["$","p","6",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>Corner desks</strong> (L-shaped) offer the most usable surface area per square foot of floor space. The downside: they lock you into a layout and are harder to move. Only commit to a corner desk if you are certain about your room arrangement."}}],["$","h2","7",{"id":"solid-vs-height-adjustable","children":"Solid vs. Height-Adjustable"}],["$","p","8",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"If you spend more than six hours a day at your desk, a height-adjustable (sit-stand) desk is genuinely worth the investment. The ability to break up sitting with standing periods reduces fatigue measurably."}}],["$","p","9",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"Fixed-height desks are simpler, sturdier, and cheaper. If you are disciplined about getting up and moving regularly, a fixed desk is perfectly fine."}}],["$","p","10",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>The standard desk height is 29–30 inches</strong>, which is optimised for an average-height adult sitting in a standard chair. If you are notably taller or shorter than average, you will want either a height-adjustable desk or a desk with a non-standard height."}}],["$","h2","11",{"id":"material-guide","children":"Material Guide"}],["$","p","12",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>Solid wood</strong>: Beautiful, durable, and heavy. Real hardwood desks (oak, walnut, maple) age well and last decades. Expensive but worth it if you treat the desk as a long-term investment."}}],["$","p","13",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>MDF with laminate</strong>: The most common material in mid-range desks (IKEA's LINNMON is the classic example). Lightweight, affordable, and perfectly adequate. Not resistant to moisture or heavy impact."}}],["$","p","14",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>Bamboo</strong>: Increasingly popular in modern desks. Sustainable, hard, and attractive. A good middle ground between price and quality."}}],"$Lb","$Lc","$Ld","$Le","$Lf","$L10","$L11","$L12","$L13","$L14","$L15","$L16","$L17","$L18"]}],"$L19","$L1a","$L1b"]}],"$L1c"]}]
9:["$","script","script-0",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/0wu484j-81s3l.js","async":true}]
a:["$","$L1d",null,{"children":["$","$1e",null,{"name":"Next.MetadataOutlet","children":"$@1f"}]}]
b:["$","p","15",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>Metal</strong>: Steel-framed desks offer excellent durability and a clean industrial aesthetic. The top surface is usually wood, glass, or MDF."}}]
c:["$","p","16",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>Glass</strong>: Looks stunning in photos; is a fingerprint and scratch magnet in practice. Not recommended for daily use."}}]
d:["$","h2","17",{"id":"storage-decisions","children":"Storage Decisions"}]
e:["$","p","18",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"Built-in drawers reduce clutter but limit flexibility. A desk with no drawers combined with a separate filing cabinet or under-desk pedestal is often more versatile."}}]
f:["$","p","19",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"If you lean toward a clean, minimal setup, avoid built-in storage entirely. A clear desk surface is easier to maintain when there are no drawers tempting you to accumulate things."}}]
10:["$","h2","20",{"id":"shape","children":"Shape"}]
11:["$","p","21",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>Rectangular desks</strong> are the most flexible. They work in almost any room configuration and can be repositioned easily."}}]
12:["$","p","22",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>L-shaped desks</strong> maximise surface area and work well when you need to separate tasks spatially — primary work on one side, reference materials or a second screen on the other."}}]
13:["$","p","23",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>Curved or wave-shaped desks</strong> look interesting but often result in wasted surface area and awkward ergonomic positions. Generally not worth the trade-off."}}]
14:["$","h2","24",{"id":"what-to-look-for-in-a-frame","children":"What to Look For in a Frame"}]
15:["$","p","25",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"The frame matters as much as the top. Look for:"}}]
16:["$","ul","26",{"children":[["$","li","0",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>Thick legs or a crossbar</strong> for stability. A desk that wobbles when you type is exhausting."}}],["$","li","1",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>Cable management features</strong> — grommets, cable trays, or routing channels built in."}}],["$","li","2",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>Weight capacity</strong> — especially if you use a monitor arm or have heavy equipment."}}]]}]
17:["$","h2","27",{"id":"the-floor-test","children":"The Floor Test"}]
18:["$","p","28",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"Before buying, crouch down and look at the floor in your workspace. Is it level? Does it have rugs that will cause wobble? A desk that sits perfectly in a showroom may wobble on an uneven floor. Adjustable leg feet are a simple and often overlooked must-have."}}]
19:["$","div",null,{"className":"mt-10 pt-8 border-t border-stone-200 dark:border-stone-800 flex flex-wrap items-center gap-3","children":[["$","span",null,{"className":"text-sm font-medium text-stone-500 dark:text-stone-400","children":"Topic:"}],["$","$L3",null,{"href":"/blog?category=Workspace","className":"text-sm font-semibold px-3 py-1 rounded-full bg-blue-50 text-blue-700 hover:opacity-80 transition-opacity","children":"Workspace"}],[["$","$L3","desk",{"href":"/blog/tag/desk","className":"text-sm font-medium px-3 py-1 rounded-full bg-stone-100 dark:bg-stone-800 text-stone-600 dark:text-stone-300 hover:bg-orange-50 dark:hover:bg-orange-900/30 hover:text-orange-600 dark:hover:text-orange-400 transition-colors","children":["#","desk"]}],["$","$L3","buying-guide",{"href":"/blog/tag/buying-guide","className":"text-sm font-medium px-3 py-1 rounded-full bg-stone-100 dark:bg-stone-800 text-stone-600 dark:text-stone-300 hover:bg-orange-50 dark:hover:bg-orange-900/30 hover:text-orange-600 dark:hover:text-orange-400 transition-colors","children":["#","buying-guide"]}],["$","$L3","home-office",{"href":"/blog/tag/home-office","className":"text-sm font-medium px-3 py-1 rounded-full bg-stone-100 dark:bg-stone-800 text-stone-600 dark:text-stone-300 hover:bg-orange-50 dark:hover:bg-orange-900/30 hover:text-orange-600 dark:hover:text-orange-400 transition-colors","children":["#","home-office"]}],["$","$L3","setup-guide",{"href":"/blog/tag/setup-guide","className":"text-sm font-medium px-3 py-1 rounded-full bg-stone-100 dark:bg-stone-800 text-stone-600 dark:text-stone-300 hover:bg-orange-50 dark:hover:bg-orange-900/30 hover:text-orange-600 dark:hover:text-orange-400 transition-colors","children":["#","setup-guide"]}]]]}]
